title: crataegus aestivalis f. luculenta
intro: Crataegus aestivalis f. luculenta, also known as the Midsummer Hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus aestivalis f. luculenta include reducing blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and providing anti-arrhythmic effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
